creator: jeffrey_in_nyc
caption:
Would you visit this secret place in NYC? 

*details are pinned in the comments*

#nyc #NewYork #travel #visitnyc #nybucketlist

transcription.text: Did you know that on the third floor of this building in New York City, there's something really cool that most people don't know about? There are no signs on the outside, so you'll go through this front door, ring the bell for the third floor, go up the stairs, open the door, and you'll find this secret bookstore. This isn't your typical bookstore, though, because it has some of the most rare books known to Earth. This includes books that are over 500 years old, the folios of Shakespeare, one of which just sold for 5 million dollars, books by Walt Whitman, Karl Marx, a very early copy of Harry Potter, paintings by Andy Warhol, and some of the books are bigger than my torso. This felt a lot more like a secret museum that nobody knows about. It's called Peter Harrington, and it's located on the Upper East Side.
